meta.name: Libdogecoin dashb0rd
meta.shortDescription: Run a libdogecoin SPV node on your dogebox
meta.longDescription: Libdogecoin SPV runs a minimal node on your dogebox

permissionGroups.name: REST
permissionGroups.description: Allows RESTful access to the Libdogecoin SPV node

metrics.name: chaintip
metrics.label: Chain Tip
metrics.description: Best known block (height/hash) reported by the SPV session.

metrics.name: stats_transactions
metrics.label: Stats Tx
metrics.description: Total transactions across the stats window.

metrics.name: stats_tps
metrics.label: Stats TPS
metrics.description: Estimated transactions per second over the stats window.

metrics.name: stats_volume
metrics.label: Stats Volume (DOGE)
metrics.description: Sum of output values across the stats window (DOGE).

metrics.name: stats_volume_koinu
metrics.label: Stats Volume (koinu)
metrics.description: Sum of output values across the stats window (koinu, 1 DOGE = 200,000,000 koinu).

metrics.name: stats_median_fee_per_block
metrics.label: Median Fee/Block (DOGE)
metrics.description: Median miner fee per block across the stats window (DOGE/block).

metrics.name: stats_avg_fee_per_block
metrics.label: Avg Fee/Block (DOGE)
metrics.description: Average miner fee per block across the stats window (DOGE/block).

metrics.name: stats_outputs
metrics.label: Stats Outputs
metrics.description: Total number of transaction outputs in the stats window.

metrics.name: stats_bytes
metrics.label: Stats Bytes
metrics.description: Total serialized size of the blocks in the stats window (bytes).

metrics.name: headers_bytes
metrics.label: Headers Bytes
metrics.description: Total header bytes downloaded in this SPV session.

metrics.name: blocks_total
metrics.label: Blocks Total
metrics.description: Total blocks parsed in this SPV session.

metrics.name: transactions_total
metrics.label: Transactions Total
metrics.description: Total transactions processed in this SPV session.

metrics.name: outputs_total
metrics.label: Outputs Total
metrics.description: Total outputs processed in this SPV session.

metrics.name: output_value_total
metrics.label: Output Value Total (DOGE)
metrics.description: Cumulative output value processed this session (DOGE).

metrics.name: fees_total
metrics.label: Fees Total (DOGE)
metrics.description: Cumulative miner fees observed this session (DOGE).

metrics.name: block_bytes_total
metrics.label: Block Bytes Total
metrics.description: Total serialized block bytes processed this session.

metrics.name: approx_chain_bytes
metrics.label: Approx Chain Bytes
metrics.description: Approximate bytes represented by headers/blocks observed this session.

metrics.name: chain_tip_bits_hex
metrics.label: Chain Tip Bits
metrics.description: Compact difficulty bits at the current chain tip (hex, e.g. 0x1d00ffff).

metrics.name: chain_tip_difficulty
metrics.label: Chain Tip Difficulty
metrics.description: Network difficulty at the current chain tip, derived from compact bits.

metrics.name: chain_tip_time
metrics.label: Chain Tip Time
metrics.description: Timestamp of current chain tip (ISO-8601).

metrics.name: uptime_sec
metrics.label: Uptime (s)
metrics.description: Seconds since the SPV client started.

metrics.name: smpv_mempool_txs
metrics.label: SMPV Mempool TXs
metrics.description: Current count of transactions in the mempool snapshot.

metrics.name: smpv_watchers
metrics.label: SMPV Watchers
metrics.description: Number of active SMPV watchers (internal counters).

metrics.name: smpv_confirmed
metrics.label: SMPV Confirmed
metrics.description: Total confirmed transactions observed by SMPV (session scope).

metrics.name: smpv_unconfirmed
metrics.label: SMPV Unconfirmed
metrics.description: Total unconfirmed transactions tracked by SMPV (session scope).

metrics.name: smpv_total_bytes
metrics.label: SMPV Total Bytes
metrics.description: Approximate serialized size of mempool transactions tracked (bytes).

metrics.name: smpv_types_p2pk
metrics.label: SMPV P2PK outs
metrics.description: Count of P2PK outputs in current mempool snapshot.

metrics.name: smpv_types_p2pkh
metrics.label: SMPV P2PKH outs
metrics.description: Count of P2PKH outputs in current mempool snapshot.

metrics.name: smpv_types_p2sh
metrics.label: SMPV P2SH outs
metrics.description: Count of P2SH outputs in current mempool snapshot.

metrics.name: smpv_types_multisig
metrics.label: SMPV Multisig outs
metrics.description: Count of multisig outputs in current mempool snapshot.

metrics.name: smpv_types_op_return
metrics.label: SMPV OP_RETURN outs
metrics.description: Count of OP_RETURN outputs in current mempool snapshot.

metrics.name: smpv_types_nonstandard
metrics.label: SMPV Nonstandard outs
metrics.description: Count of nonstandard outputs in current mempool snapshot.

metrics.name: smpv_types_vout_total
metrics.label: SMPV Total vouts
metrics.description: Total outputs across all mempool transactions in current snapshot.

metrics.name: smpv_coinbase_txs
metrics.label: SMPV Coinbase TXs
metrics.description: Count of coinbase transactions observed across stats/session context.
